parameters: It says, "Offer the Mother Slime's soul."
You offered the Mother Slime's soul!
You don't have the Mother Slime's soul.
The Mother Slime's soul is burning brightly
I was repelled by a mysterious force.
It says to offer the Kraken's soul.
I don't have the Kraken's soul.
The Kraken's soul is burning brightly.
It seems the barrier crystal has shattered.

Light a bonfire? (You can save and return at
bonfires.)

You need a torch to light a bonfire
(Make one at the workbench)
It says, "Offer the soul of the Red Dragon."
The soul of the Red Dragon has been offered!
You don't have the soul of the Red Dragon.
The Red Dragon's soul is burning brightly.
Wow... what a mysterious and wonderful place~

It looks like an ancient ruin... probably no one lives
here.

If only my phone wasn't broken, I'd take so many
pictures...

There's some kind of pedestal here, let's check it
out!

Wow... what a mysterious and wonderful place~

It looks like an ancient ruin... probably no one lives
here.

If only my phone wasn't broken, I'd take so many
pictures...

There's some kind of pedestal here, let's check it
out!

The space is distorting... (An important event is
about to occur.)

I feel a pressure far stronger than any formidable
enemy I've faced so far... But it doesn't seem
hostile.
\V[3]... I finally met you... It's been so long...

M...Mom...? What's with that outfit... Cosplay...? (It
looks just like her, but... something feels off...)
It seems the Risa of this world is living happily.
I came from a different parallel world.

In my world, \V[3] is dead, and the shock of that
turned me into a Demon King. I destroyed the world out
of grief and despair...

My goal is your seed... That's why I lured you to this
island.

My seed...!? (I see... So the mom from another world
was the mastermind...)

If you do, we can bring prosperity back to humanity...
We can become the new Adam and Eve.

You must hate the idea, right...? Even though I'm also
Risa, I'm not the same as your Risa (mother)...

Even if you're my mom from another world... I still
want you to be happy.
If it's okay with me, I'll help you!

I can see a bit into the future... With this, healthy
twins, a boy and a girl, will be born.

I'll return to my world... Live happily with the Risa
of this world...
